textByHash.24519f932ddb0b21e7b575e24f5ff1449db21dd8: Aye? Who's that, what do you want?
textByHash.8462477a846954b04eac2a727ec051b8304cf8a8: I got betta' things to do than waste my time talkin' to you.
textByHash.b9656b7b3d5a90137b76e0578aa0d4126e395785: Then get out of here and stop botherin' me.
textByHash.eeb37e237f23e3acb9b9a46b2108521298940701: [laugh][laugh]! Sorry mate, you'll not be able to make any canoes outta that tree there. You'll need to get a bit more skilled at the craft of Woodcuttin'.
textByHash.d65653a2032aa94aed741a241989eb1b9532cece: But once you get a bit betta', you'll be able to make a canoe and ride the river.
textByHash.8fdd1dc4f6d6e721734c17e0073364831fcdc94f: It's not 'ard mate, you just gotta chop that tree o'er there down.
textByHash.f40e310bccf367d4becd3f78ef007a44e93eae04: Then cut it down into a canoe. So simple a gobbo could do it.
textByHash.99bec1fda7537c1a68881fc2d3bad37a01bb1419: But you got no chance of turning it into a beautiful canoe.
textByHash.a8cfa8c4ab2514a8ab6c654b8f3a5f6e60382f59: I can tell by lookin' at ya! You ain't a woodcutter, most you'd be able to do is sail to the next stop on a log.
textByHash.47bc44193ae43320eae3c706d36a1d8989984d13: Hmm, s'pose you could make a decent canoe with your skills. you'll be able to make a dugout, I reckons.
textByHash.871bfaef696443fb0e7883c21b52de47282a5aa7: Err, probably about two stops before it sinks on ya.
textByHash.c82cab6505fae6350c386847729f33391430c734: Pah, I don't think so. You'll be lucky to make it past Varrock.
textByHash.899d722457c0b6fa745db1d13bc9c61fe903bc00: Well bless me axe, you're almost as good a woodchopper as meself! You'll have no issue craftin' the best of the best, the waka canoe.
textByHash.30c33447b699bdae82448128a0c3d44725dd36b4: One of those beauties can take you up further in the Wilderness. Beautiful place that.
